m_26_14.description: Source-agnostic asset normalizer: maps any HWAM/SWAM source to unified asset.* schema and computes deterministic asset.id

description: Normalize asset inventory events from any source (osquery, CrowdStrike, Tenable, Qualys, Intune, Jamf, ServiceNow) to the unified asset.* schema. Called by source-specific sub-pipelines after their own field extraction.

script.description: Ensure asset object exists; set source-agnostic defaults
Derive asset.component (M-26-14 reporting component / bureau-enclave rollup dimension) from best available org grouping; default 'unattributed'
Compute asset.id from best available resolution key: serial > bios_uuid > agent_id > mac > hostname

fingerprint.description: Deterministic asset.id: same device → same ID across all sources and over time

script.description: Cross-populate os.build and os.eol: asset.os.* ↔ top-level os.*
Compute vulnerability.age_days from vulnerability.first_found if not already set

fingerprint.description: Log integrity hash covering asset identity + state + ingest time
